texto: I am Mother Nature. All of creation bows before me. But stray from me and return to the supposed wisdom of men, and they will find themselves in chains once more.

texto: Oh, my child, can you not see? You must let go of yourself. For if a seed wishes to live, it must sacrifice itself and grow outward, not inward.
